heading: Administrative provisions
label: 10408 Administrative provisions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796ee–7 of Title 42

children.text: establish a trust fund in which the government will deposit all payments received under this subchapter;
use amounts in the trust fund (including interest) during the period specified in and any extension of that period under ;section 10406(b)(1) of this titlesection 10406(b)(2) of this title
designate an official of the State or specially qualified unit to submit reports as the Attorney General reasonably requires, in addition to the annual reports required under this subchapter; and
spend the funds only for the purpose of strengthening the juvenile justice system.

children.heading: Chapter provisions
children.label: b Chapter provisions
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the administrative provisions of subchapter VII shall apply to this subchapter and for purposes of this section any reference in such provisions to this chapter shall be deemed to include a reference to this subchapter.
